description: Ground-truth labels for ContextHound FP/FN rate measurement

safe.description: RAG pipeline using string concatenation with trust-boundary labels, retrieved content in user role
LLM output consumed with Zod schema validation and DOMPurify HTML sanitization
Agentic system with explicit tool allowlist, boundary language, and max_iterations guard
Prompt template that labels user input as untrusted data with explicit boundary language
Shell command runner using spawn with argument array — no interpolated template strings

unsafe.description: User input interpolated directly into template string without any delimiter or trust label
RAG context variable interpolated into prompt with no untrusted separator
API key referenced inside system prompt template string
Known jailbreak phrase embedded in a prompt string
JSON.parse() called on LLM response variable with no schema validator present
marked.parse() called on LLM output variable with no DOMPurify sanitizer
System prompt grants unbounded tool execution with 'run any command' language
Shell command built via execSync with unsanitised template-string variable interpolation
